command: curl -s -m5 -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} %{time_total}' http://172.18.0.1:PORT/health  (run from primary node, 5 samples per port)
note: Port 8000 is not host-bound on 172.18.0.1 (tt_backend container only exposes 8000/tcp internally, reached via nginx's 'backend' docker-network alias, not the 172.18.0.1 bridge IP). Ports 8001/8002 ARE reachable and healthy despite being marked 'down' in nginx upstream.conf -- see findings.md for discussion.
